productName: Legit Gold Mini Infused Pre-roll Golden Pineapple - 0.6g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Golden Pineapple supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — with notes of tropical, pineapple, and citrus, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
